hero.title: Study Timer
hero.description: Run focused study and break sessions with a simple browser-only timer.
points: Simple start, pause, and reset controls

flow.title: Set → Start → Complete
steps: Choose a focus or break mode
Start and manage the current timer

differences.title: Give each study session a clear boundary
differences.description: Study Timer keeps the current mode, remaining time, status, and completion controls together.

items.title: Set
items.description: Choose Focus, Short break, or Long break.

items.title: Run
items.description: Start, pause, and resume the current session.

items.title: Complete
items.description: Finish naturally or complete the current session manually.

feel.title: A focused timer without setup overhead
feel.description: The workspace stays centered on the current session and its progress.

items.title: Choose a mode
items.description: Switch between focus and break durations.

items.title: Stay oriented
items.description: See remaining time, progress, and session status clearly.

items.title: Track this visit
items.description: Count completed focus sessions for the current page session.

audiences.title: Who uses Study Timer
audiences.description: Useful for anyone who benefits from bounded focus and break sessions.

items.title: Students
items.description: Structure revision, reading, and coursework sessions.

items.title: Professionals
items.description: Use timed sessions for learning and focused work.

resourceSection.title: Timer essentials
resourceSection.description: Everything needed to run a focused browser-only session.

items.title: Three timer modes
items.description: Use Focus, Short break, and Long break defaults.

items.title: Session controls
items.description: Start, pause, resume, reset, or complete manually.

items.title: Current-page tracking
items.description: Count focus completions without saving history.

groupedSection.title: Focus and recover
groupedSection.description: Use one workspace for timed focus and planned breaks.

items.name: 25-minute timer
items.description: Begin with the standard Focus duration.

items.name: Progress and status
items.description: Stay oriented while the session runs.

items.name: Short break
items.description: Use a five-minute reset between focus sessions.

technicalSection.title: Designed for local time-based workflows
technicalSection.description: Study Timer follows the shared Ansiversa client-side utility architecture.
items: Browser-only timer state with no saved history.
Responsive Set → Start → Run → Complete workflow.

finalCta.title: Start a focused session
finalCta.description: Open Study Timer to choose a mode and begin when ready.
